resident_island_installer_slice.attribution: Profile-build-ID movement changed whole-program register allocation; no product behavior or source-level feature was added.

future_policy: Exact-byte pinning remains active. A lower-bound tolerance such as >=16 B may be proposed only by a separate owner-reviewed authorization if profile-ID repins become recurring noise; this authorization creates no tolerance zone.
owner_decision: Authorize the exact six-byte resident-island-installer slice-headroom debit and repin the margin from 33 B to 27 B. Do not chase unused bytes or remove the build contract from product identity.
claim_limit: This authorization permits only the measured installer-slice repin. It does not prove the varied double-build, promote a product set, or claim R3/R4/R5/R6/G5/G6 acceptance.
